creator: conrads@cox.net
text:
Recent commit to src/sys causing build of acroreadwrapper to fail
	in linux_adobe.c (-Werror probably needs to be disabled in the 
	port).  Rebuild is needed, as the previously existing module will
	no longer load after new world/kernel installed.

Fix: May be as simple as disabling -Werror in port build.  Not sure.
How-To-Repeat: 	Update /usr/src, rebuild/install world and kernel.  
	/usr/local/libexec/linux_adobe/linux_adobe.ko fails to load with 
	"Exec format error"
